ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workflow_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Offset, Gap open penalty) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter's function */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value assigned to the parameter */,
  "workflow_file_param" TEXT /* The corresponding parameter name in the workflow file */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., numeric, string) */,
  "minimum_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "maximum_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is mandatory for the workflow */,
  "depends_on" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter it depends on (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter configuration */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being configured */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created/modified the configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this configuration belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last modified */,
  "workflow_file" TEXT /* Path to the workflow file used for this configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_configs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_configs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES workflow_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_configs_workflow_file FOREIGN KEY ("workflow_file") REFERENCES workflow_files ("file_path"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_configs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the parameter before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value assigned to the parameter */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_history_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES workflow_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project owner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workflow_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workflow file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the workflow file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the workflow file */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Contents of the workflow file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)
